h1: Bathroom Remodeling Services in Tarpon Springs, FL
intro: Elevate your bathroom with Titan Homes Group's premium bathroom remodeling services in Tarpon Springs, FL. From walk-in shower installations to complete spa-quality transformations, we handle every detail.
bodyContent:
Titan Homes Group offers comprehensive bathroom remodeling services to homeowners in Tarpon Springs, FL. Our licensed team transforms outdated bathrooms into stunning, functional spaces that increase both your daily quality of life and your home's value.

Whether you're dreaming of a master bathroom with a freestanding soaking tub and rain shower, a sleek guest bathroom refresh, or an ADA-accessible renovation, our Tarpon Springs bathroom remodeling team delivers with expert craftsmanship and attention to detail.

Our bathroom remodeling services in Tarpon Springs include custom tile work (floor, wall, and accent), frameless glass shower enclosures, walk-in shower conversions, vanity and fixture upgrades, heated flooring, and all associated plumbing and electrical work.

Tarpon Springs homeowners consistently rate Titan Homes Group 5 stars for professionalism, communication, and the quality of our finished work. We're proud to be a BBB Accredited, NKBA Certified contractor serving Tarpon Springs and the broader Tampa Bay region.

faqs.question: How much does bathroom remodeling cost in Tarpon Springs, FL?
faqs.answer: Bathroom remodeling in Tarpon Springs typically starts around $8,000 for a basic update and ranges to $50,000+ for a complete luxury master bath renovation. The final cost depends on bathroom size, tile selection, fixture quality, and plumbing requirements.

faqs.question: How long does a bathroom remodel take in Tarpon Springs?
faqs.answer: A standard bathroom remodel in Tarpon Springs takes 2–4 weeks. Larger master bath renovations with custom tilework can take 4–6 weeks. We'll provide a detailed timeline after your free consultation.

faqs.question: Do you handle plumbing and electrical for Tarpon Springs bathroom remodels?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team includes licensed plumbers and electricians who handle all rough-in and finish work. Everything is coordinated in-house for a seamless Tarpon Springs bathroom remodeling experience.
